raw_step.causal_note: Repair was followed by a targeted XML inspection of representative cells.

commands:
python3 - <<'PY'
from zipfile import ZipFile
from pathlib import Path
import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
p = Path('[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]')
with ZipFile(p) as z:
    root = ET.fromstring(z.read('xl/worksheets/sheet1.xml'))
    ns = {'a':'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/spreadsheetml/2006/main'}
    for ref in ['A1','A2','B2','A3','B3','H7','B18']:
        for c in root.findall('.//a:c', ns):
            if c.attrib.get('r') == ref:
                print(ref, c.attrib)
                break
PY
